logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.

WARNING: [HLS 200-880] The II Violation in module 'find_largest_component_ccl_Pipeline_CCL_X_LOOP' (loop 'CCL_X_LOOP'): Unable to enforce a carried dependence constraint (II = 11, distance = 1, offset = 1) between 'store' operation ('curr_label_V_addr_1_write_ln175', hls_fajlovi/card_recognizer_dram_hls.cpp:175) of variable 'root.V', hls_fajlovi/card_recognizer_dram_hls.cpp:60 on array 'curr_label_V' and 'load' operation ('curr_label_V_load', hls_fajlovi/card_recognizer_dram_hls.cpp:142) on array 'curr_label_V'. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-880 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-880.html
